name: Square
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with Square
metaTitle: Build AI Support and Internal Agents for Square | DocsBot
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use Square for payment, order, customer, and commerce workflows with secure actions, testing, and approval controls.
intro: Square helps businesses manage payments, orders, customers, inventory, and related commerce workflows in one platform. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the Square-powered agent behavior you want in plain language and have DocsBot create a reusable Skill for support or internal operations. The result is an AI agent that can answer questions, look up live Square data, trigger approved actions, and prepare clean handoffs without exposing sensitive access.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up order, payment, refund, or receipt status in Square while responding to website chat or helpdesk tickets.
Use a support agent to verify customer purchase history in Square and prepare a refund, replacement, or escalation summary for human approval.
Enable the agent to create or update customer notes, attach support context, and keep Square customer records aligned with the conversation.
Have the agent summarize recent transactions, disputes, or fulfillment details from Square so customers get faster answers without waiting for manual research.
Trigger approved follow-up workflows from a support conversation, such as notifying operations about a failed payment, missing order, or pickup issue tied to Square data.
internalUseCases: Let employees chat with a private DocsBot agent in Slack, Microsoft Teams, or an internal chat to retrieve Square customer, order, catalog, payout, or payment information without switching systems.
Help support, finance, or operations teams use an internal agent to summarize transaction activity, investigate refunds, and prepare dispute or reconciliation handoffs using Square data.
Enable team members to ask the agent to follow SOPs for refund review, order issue triage, payment exception handling, or customer record updates with appropriate approval steps.
Give managers an internal AI assistant that can research Square sales or payment context, generate summaries, and route the next action to the right teammate or system.
Support multi-step employee workflows where the agent gathers missing details, checks Square records, and produces a clear action summary for finance, support, or store operations teams.
whatYouCanBuild: A support Skill that checks Square payment or refund status during customer conversations.
An order lookup Skill that pulls Square transaction and receipt details for support teams.
A refund review Skill that gathers Square context and routes cases for approval.
A customer record Skill that updates notes or tags in Square after support interactions.
A finance assistant Skill that summarizes payouts, payments, and exceptions for internal teams.
An operations Skill that checks Square order issues and prepares escalation handoffs automatically.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the Square agent to do in plain language, such as checking payment status, preparing refund handoffs, or updating customer records during support conversations.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder translates that goal into a reusable DocsBot Skill, chooses the safest workflow, identifies the Square connection details it needs, and defines secure runtime configuration without asking you to manually map every technical step.

howItWorks.title: Connections stay protected
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder sets up secure authentication handling, keeps credentials out of chats and Skill content, proxies secrets through approved runtime configuration, and scopes access to only the Square data, actions, users, and records needed for the workflow.

howItWorks.title: Safety rules are added
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder adds approval boundaries and action limits for sensitive steps such as refunds, record changes, or workflow triggers so the agent operates within your business rules.

howItWorks.title: Automated testing improves it
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios against the Skill, finds bugs, missing instructions, weak permission checks, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated self-improvement loop before deployment.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with Square?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the Square workflow you want in plain language and Skill Builder creates the agent ability for lookups, updates, summaries, and approved actions. It also handles secure connection design, scoped permissions, testing, and deployment to the right DocsBot agent.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use Square data to answer customer questions?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can be designed to use Square data during website chats or helpdesk replies to check orders, payments, refunds, receipts, or customer details. You control which records and actions are allowed, and sensitive actions can require approval.

faq.question: What customer support workflows can DocsBot automate with Square?
faq.answer: Teams can build workflows for payment status checks, order research, refund preparation, customer record updates, escalation summaries, and operational handoffs tied to Square activity. The agent can answer the customer, gather missing context, and take bounded next steps inside your rules.

faq.question: Can an internal AI assistant help employees work faster in Square?
faq.answer: Yes, private DocsBot agents can help employees retrieve Square information, investigate payment issues, summarize transaction activity, and follow internal SOPs from chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams. This reduces tab switching and helps teams complete repeatable workflows more consistently.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep Square actions secure?
faq.answer: Skill Builder defines the required configuration values, protects authentication through secure runtime handling, keeps secrets out of chat transcripts and generated content, and scopes access to the minimum needed permissions. It can also add approval checkpoints for higher-risk actions like refunds or record changes.

faq.question: Can DocsBot trigger actions in Square instead of only answering questions?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot Skills can be designed for AI Actions such as updating records, preparing handoffs, triggering follow-up workflows, or generating summaries based on Square data. Those actions are bounded by the permissions, approvals, and workflow limits you choose.

brand.title: Square
brand.description: Square is a comprehensive commerce platform that empowers businesses of all sizes to manage payments, point‑of‑sale, payroll, inventory, and customer relationships from a single integrated system. Offering sleek hardware like Square Register, Terminal, and Reader, alongside cloud‑based software, Square enables merchants to accept in‑person and online payments, run marketing and loyalty programs, schedule staff, and access financing. Its ecosystem connects with hundreds of third‑party apps, providing tools for retail, food & beverage, services, beauty, and more. With transparent pricing, no long‑term contracts, and AI‑driven insights, Square helps entrepreneurs streamline operations, grow revenue, and focus on delivering great experiences to their customers.
